title: New Vanilla
description: This is an optimized modpack based on the vanilla, but we also changed a lot of things. A new adventure! Enhanced monsters! Let's Go!
body:
# Missing mods' cloud disk share-link password: 97af
## Introduce
This is an optimized modpack based on the vanilla, but we also changed a lot of things. A new adventure! Enhanced monsters! Let's go on an adventure!
## Description
The vanilla game was always boring. As a sandbox game, it has a formulaic progression and a weak final BOSS.Although players are free to build and craft red stone machines, after a certain point, the game is over.Resources can be supplied indefinitely with features, equipment is built new, and if the player doesn't want to wait for the latest updates, the save is discarded. This is the Minecraft you want! Weekly updates bring new adventure and retirement content, and each update allows you to relax and improve yourself at the same time!  
In new update, I think I do a great thing that I have finally finished the vanilla expansion. You can play with more biomes, structures, and new interface. Integrate each mod closely through recipes, background stories, loot, and of course, various structures.  
There are some special of this:
1. More improved graphics, with tiny particles accompanying your gaming experience all the time.  
2. There are many great places for adventure. Spring is a good season for exploration.  
3. Similarly, there's nothing wrong with being a Farmer. The Farmer's Delight module and its accessories bring you a farmer relaxation experience!  
4. The original structure expansion will make you even more immersed in it!  
5. To know more and more you may download and found funture!  
## Feature
Beautiful scenery! A thrilling adventure! New gaming experience! All in the New Vanilla Modpack!
